title: How to Use NanoClaw (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: NanoClaw is a lightweight, AI-native alternative to OpenClaw for building agent swarms. It supports ephemeral Docker containers, Telegram integration, and is designed to be customized and forked by AI systems rather than human developers, with nearly 20,000 GitHub stars.
